title: Implement reconciliation script
description: Implement MAP_System/scripts/reconcile.py. Calls expire_leases() from db/claims.py, logs expired task IDs to events.jsonl and SQLite, prints a summary. Runnable standalone or from a cron. No daemon process — just a single-shot script.
acceptance_criteria: expire_leases() result logged to events.jsonl and SQLite events table
Prints count of tasks returned to READY and their IDs
No-op run (nothing expired) exits cleanly with zero count
